title: Allow Different SSO Configuration for Internal vs Guest Users
excerpt: Currently we’re using OneLogin to authenticate our internal users. We are also in the process of setting up external guests, but we would like to provision them using a second provider that leverages SAML authentication. …

posts.author: sealv_wsm (Daniel Alvarado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently we’re using OneLogin to authenticate our internal users. We are also in the process of setting up external guests, but we would like to provision them using a second provider that leverages SAML authentication.

With Salesforce for example, we used to have the ability to provision multiple IDPs, not just stuck to one.

It would be of course beneficial to specify which SAML provisions which users or something of the sorts as well.

Thanks!
